---
title: "Veranstaltungen"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
toc: false
description: "chen.ist Academy-Veranstaltungen finden auf Englisch und Rumänisch statt. Werden Sie Partner und organisieren Sie in Ihrer Stadt."
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:50vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">Academy</div>
    <h1>Veranstaltungen</h1>
    <p>Hackathons, Workshops und Community-Treffen. Bauen Sie etwas Echtes mit engagierten Menschen.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:750px;">
    <div style="background:rgba(245,166,35,0.06); border:1px solid rgba(245,166,35,0.15); border-radius:16px; padding:2.5rem; text-align:center;">
      <i class="bi bi-translate" style="font-size:2rem; color:#F5A623; display:block; margin-bottom:1rem;"></i>
      <h2 style="font-size:1.5rem; margin-bottom:0.75rem;">Veranstaltungen auf Englisch & Rumänisch</h2>
      <p style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6); max-width:500px; margin:0 auto 1.5rem;">Unsere Veranstaltungen finden derzeit auf Englisch und Rumänisch in Rumänien statt. Entdecken Sie das vollständige Programm unten.</p>
      <a href="/academy/events.html" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;">Alle Veranstaltungen ansehen (EN)</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:6rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:750px;">
    <h2>Kommende Veranstaltungen</h2>
    <p class="sub">Klicken Sie für vollständige Informationen auf Englisch.</p>
    <div class="up-item">
      <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;"><i class="bi bi-shield-lock" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i></div>
      <div style="flex-grow:1;">
        <h4><a href="/academy/events/pages/cybersecurity-hackathon.html">Cybersecurity Hackathon</a></h4>
        <div class="up-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> 13.–14. Juni 2026 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Bukarest</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-badge up-badge-open">Offen</div>
    </div>
    <div class="up-item">
      <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;"><i class="bi bi-cpu" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i></div>
      <div style="flex-grow:1;">
        <h4><a href="/academy/events/pages/ai-ethics-hackathon.html">AI Ethics Hackathon</a></h4>
        <div class="up-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> 18.–19. Juli 2026 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Bukarest</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-badge up-badge-open">Offen</div>
    </div>
    <div class="up-item">
      <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i></div>
      <div style="flex-grow:1;">
        <h4><a href="/academy/events/pages/summer-school-2025.html">Sommerschule 2026</a></h4>
        <div class="up-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> 1.–15. Aug 2026 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Bukarest</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-badge up-badge-soon">Bald</div>
    </div>
    <div class="up-item">
      <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;"><i class="bi bi-tools" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i></div>
      <div style="flex-grow:1;">
        <h4><a href="/academy/events/pages/makers-workshop.html">Makers Workshop</a></h4>
        <div class="up-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> 5. Sep 2026 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Brașov</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-badge up-badge-soon">Bald</div>
    </div>
    <div class="up-item">
      <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;"><i class="bi bi-rocket-takeoff" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i></div>
      <div style="flex-grow:1;">
        <h4><a href="/academy/events/pages/space-hackathon.html">Space Hackathon</a></h4>
        <div class="up-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> 3.–4. Okt 2026 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-badge up-badge-soon">Bald</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Möchten Sie in Ihrer Stadt organisieren?</h2>
    <p>Werden Sie Partner unserer Academy und organisieren Sie Hackathons, Workshops oder Schulungen in Ihrem Unternehmen oder Ihrer Stadt.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/de/booking/" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;"><i class="bi bi-handshake me-2"></i>Partner werden</a>
      <a href="/de/academy/partnerships.html" class="m-bo" style="border-color:#F5A623; color:#F5A623;">Mehr über Partnerschaften</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
